title: Hornet Removal in Newark, NJ | $350-$550
metaDescription: Professional hornet removal services in Newark, NJ starting at $350. Fast, safe hornet nest removal for homes and businesses. Licensed experts serving Newark area.
intro: Best Pest Control NYC provides expert hornet removal services throughout Newark, New Jersey, with transparent pricing from $350 to $550. Our certified technicians safely eliminate hornet nests from residential and commercial properties across Newark's diverse neighborhoods. We respond quickly to protect Newark families and businesses from aggressive hornet infestations.
whyUs: With years of experience serving the Newark metropolitan area, our licensed professionals use the latest safety equipment and proven techniques to remove hornet nests efficiently. We offer same-day emergency service, guaranteed results, and competitive pricing tailored to Newark residents and business owners.
localContext: Newark's historic brownstones, multi-family homes in the Ironbound District, and commercial buildings downtown often attract hornets seeking shelter in eaves, attics, and wall voids. From Branch Brook Park neighborhoods to properties near the Passaic River, our team knows the unique pest challenges facing Newark structures and responds with targeted hornet removal solutions.

faqs.question: How much does hornet removal cost in Newark, NJ?
faqs.answer: Hornet removal in Newark typically costs between $350 and $550, depending on the nest location, size, and accessibility. Ground-level nests are generally less expensive, while nests in high eaves, attics, or wall voids may require additional equipment and labor, placing them at the higher end of the price range.

faqs.question: How quickly can you remove a hornet nest in Newark?
faqs.answer: We offer same-day and emergency hornet removal services throughout Newark. Most hornet nest removals are completed within 1-2 hours once our technician arrives. We understand that hornets pose immediate danger, so we prioritize rapid response times for Newark residents and businesses.

faqs.question: Is hornet removal safe for my family and pets in Newark?
faqs.answer: Yes, our hornet removal process is completely safe for your family and pets. We use professional-grade protective equipment and EPA-approved treatments that effectively eliminate hornets while minimizing risk to people and animals. We'll provide clear instructions on any temporary precautions needed during the removal process.

faqs.question: What's the difference between hornets and wasps in Newark?
faqs.answer: Hornets are larger than most wasps, typically measuring 1-1.5 inches, and build large, enclosed paper nests often found in trees or under eaves. While both can sting, hornets are generally more aggressive when defending their nests. Our Newark technicians are trained to identify and safely remove both hornet and wasp nests using appropriate techniques for each species.
